scripts.build: bun run generate:types && rm -rf ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist && bun build */main.tsx --outdir ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist --entry-naming [dir]/index.[ext] --chunk-naming chunks/[name]-[hash].[ext] --splitting --format esm --minify && cp shared/logo.png ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist/logo.png && cp sidebar-details/assets/occt-import-js.wasm ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist/occt-import-js.wasm && cp sidebar-details/assets/model-viewer.min.js ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist/model-viewer.min.js
scripts.watch: bun run generate:types && bun build */main.tsx --outdir ../../vscode-atopile/webview-dist --entry-naming [dir]/index.[ext] --chunk-naming chunks/[name]-[hash].[ext] --splitting --format esm --watch
